skills.name: privacy-pools-integration
guardrails: Use relayed withdrawals via fastrelay.xyz as the standard withdrawal path
Never expose raw secrets in copy/paste flows
Verify ASP root parity before proof submission
Use deployment startBlock for event scans, not genesis

skills.name: privacy-pools-deposit
skills.description: Deposit flow implementation for Privacy Pools
guardrails: Check minimum deposit amount before submitting
Persist label and committedValue from Deposited event
Use post-fee committedValue, not raw deposit amount
Use deployment startBlock for event scans

skills.name: privacy-pools-withdraw
skills.description: Relayed withdrawal implementation for Privacy Pools
guardrails: Request relayer quote before proof generation
Re-quote if amount, recipient, relayer, or gas-token changes
Verify ASP root parity before submission
Refresh change commitment state after partial withdrawal

skills.name: privacy-pools-ragequit
skills.description: Ragequit (public exit) implementation for Privacy Pools
guardrails: Ragequit is unconditionally available — no ASP prerequisite
Only the original depositor can ragequit a commitment
A ragequit commitment cannot later be privately withdrawn
Ragequit is a public on-chain exit — no privacy
